text:
Author's Note

Translation

I feel like they use the term "Moe" way too often these days.

Chapters Included

Chapter 62 "Beyond the Dream" (夢の先 Yume no Saki)
Chapter 63 "The Promise Made for 520 Cenz" (520センズの約束 520 Senzu no Yakusoku)
Chapter 64 "The Northern Wall of Briggs" (ブリッグズの北壁 Burigguzu no Hokuheki)
Chapter 65 "The Ironclad Rule" (鉄の掟 Tetsu no Okite)

Synopsis

From the back of the volume: 

"The brothers pursue fugitive May Chang to solve the mystery of why their alchemical powers were rendered inert, while she and Scar continue to be able to wield them. Meanwhile, Scar enlists some unlikely help to delve into the secrets of his brother's alchemical knowledge. And the newest, most horrifying homunculus makes an appearance...!"
